name: SignIt
author: Wertzui123
description: SignIt is a PocketMine-MP plugin that allows you to sign items on a text.
readme_markdown:
# SignIt
SignIt is a PocketMine-MP plugin that allows you to sign items on a text.
The .phar can be found on poggit. # Commands | Command | Description | Usage | Aliases | Permission | |---------|--------------------------------------------|----------------------|---------|---------------------| | sign | Sign the item in your hand on a given text | /sign | / | signit.command.sign | **All commands can be configured in the config file.** # Permissions | Permission | Description | Default | |------------------------|------------------------------|---------| | signit.command.sign | Permission for /sign | op | | signit.cooldown.bypass | Lets you bypass the cooldown | op | # Features * Highly customizable * Cooldowns (including multiple cooldown groups) * PurePerms support (`{group}` tag) # Support You can contact me in my discord server or create an issue. # License and Copyright SignIt is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0. For more information: https://choosealicense.com/licenses/gpl-3.0
© 2019 - 2023 Wertzui123 # Credits SignIt was written by @Wertzui123.
The icon was created by @Chrisi726.
